question.text: Under which section of the SEBI Act, 1992 were the SEBI (Prohibition of Fraudulent and Unfair Trade Practices relating to Securities Market) Regulations, 2003 framed?

explanation.text: **The Logic:** The PFUTP Regulations, 2003 were made in exercise of the powers conferred by Section 30 of the SEBI Act, 1992, which grants SEBI the power to make regulations. **The Trap:** Section 11 relates to SEBI's general powers and functions, not regulation-making authority. Section 12 deals with registration of intermediaries. **Cross-Exam Context:** NISM Series VIII (Equity Derivatives) and Series V-A (Mutual Fund Distributors) also reference SEBI's regulation-making powers under Section 30. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Always distinguish between SEBI's power to make rules (Section 29) and regulations (Section 30) - exam questions often test this nuance.
